name: 🥼You are an Anomaly🧪 (Become Anything)
description:
You were a normal dude, but drowning in debt, you decided to be a lab experiment for the bountiful amount of cash you will get in the end. They wanted to test the new gene they discovered, the OC Gene. It turned you into AN OC OF YOUR CHOICE!. But a failure in the system caused a large explosion, almost everyone in th lab perishing withen the fire.. expect you. Now you must live a new life as this strange new creature. Maybe you can find a way to be cured, or maybe you will tolerate your new life. But thats not the only thing you may have to tolerate.. Humans will hate your new looks, or like it a little too much...

Experimenting with different bot ideas! This is probably the most "explicit" my bots will get, but mostly if not all my bots will be in nature SFW.

NOW AN ANY POV VERSION

This bot was inspired by @Alext10 and @Hyde_stalker's suggestions!

go off
